notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez steals (11) 3rd base. Josh Naylor to 2nd. Josh Naylor advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Jared Triolo.

notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Gonzales to second baseman Tyler Callihan to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. J.P. Crawford out at 2nd. Julio Rodríguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mitch Garver plunked
notableEvents.detail: Mitch Garver hit by pitch. Cole Young to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder flies out to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.
